notes: Passive/fun - V9 modal (id: __tedLassoModal) titled '🩊 Ted Lasso Wisdom'. Shows a random prefix (e.g. 'Ted Lasso wants you to know:') and a random quote from a list of ~29 quotes. 'New Quote' button updates the displayed quote in-place. The modal appears on any page.
